microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end post-sale execution for Azure's resilience validation program, managing **45+ annual drills** across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) and driving **$14M+ in business impact** through structured onboarding, project tracking, and stakeholder alignment.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by **30%** and accelerated customer time-to-value on production workloads.

Served as primary cross-org liaison across 14 high-visibility recovery executions — triaging issues, coordinating engineering fixes, and maintaining clear stakeholder communication, including a sovereign-cloud test tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**.

Built an internal AI agent that restructured planning workflows, reducing cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% — surfacing a repeatable automation playbook now used across the team.

Pioneered a rack-level proactive resilience program delivered in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model adopted across Azure regions.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows by running customer demos and hands-on training sessions that onboarded 14 Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Gathered actionable customer feedback through **11+ structured user interviews**, converting themes into a prioritized roadmap request for intent-based YAML generation that directly influenced the next product cycle.
Accelerated time-to-value for internal users by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting information lookup time by **83%**.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework — translating customer pain into a clear, actionable roadmap.
Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths and reduce recurring operational toil at scale.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking toil metrics across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact improvements with data-driven confidence.
amazon_robotics: Managed a **2,000+ unit OS migration** with zero operational downtime by defining the transition strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating daily across IT, Operations, and Engineering.

Ran Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority support tickets** and keeping project timelines on track across a distributed customer-facing team.
Drove cross-functional alignment to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by **25%** and reducing escalation volume from field teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the full customer lifecycle — scoping, proposals, and invoicing — for 200+ monthly accounts through a structured CRM process that improved follow-through and conversion.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted site conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile for inbound growth.
Identified and closed margin leaks by analyzing **1,000+ project records**, delivering a profitability model that gave leadership clearer pricing signals and improved account-level ROI visibility.

tailoring_notes: 'Time-to-value' woven into microsoft_ft bullet 2 and microsoft_2023 bullet 3 — mirrors JD's 'Drive onboarding and time to value' section directly.
'Triage' and 'engineering fix / coordination' language used in microsoft_ft bullet 3 and amazon_robotics bullet 3 — mirrors JD's 'Triage and coordinate support' responsibility.
'Actionable customer feedback' and 'voice of the customer' framing used in microsoft_2023 bullet 2 — mirrors JD's 'Be the voice of the customer internally' requirement.
'Playbook' referenced in microsoft_ft bullet 4 — mirrors JD's 'help define the playbooks, templates, and processes' language for the early CS org build.
'Account-level ROI' and 'growth signals' framing in pro_painters bullet 3 and microsoft_ft bullet 1 — mirrors JD's 'Support account growth' and 'showing project outcomes and ROI' weekly task.
